benchmark_flux_dft_gate.diagnostic_basis: private +z ex/hy incident fields are injected through private post-H/post-E slots and accumulated only through private fine-owned flux/DFT planes; the same-contract uniform reference helper is benchmark-only, remains not public TFSF, and does not expose public flux, DFT, S-parameter, port, or true R/T observables The time-centered staging gate is private diagnostic evidence only: it proves a same-call local production-expressibility contract for a later private implementation attempt, not public true R/T, DFT, flux, TFSF, port, or S-parameter support. Private implementation evidence records bounded same-call centered-H helper wiring in sbp_sat_3d.py for both CPML and non-CPML paths; it is not public TFSF/DFT/flux/port/S-parameter/true-R/T evidence, so public promotion remains closed. The helper uses a predeclared bounded 0.02 relaxation on the same-call centered-H amplitude to preserve existing private proxy-regression gates while still applying the private solver-internal correction. The private helper fixture-quality recovery ladder is finite and private-only; even C1/C2 measurement-control improvements cannot claim original fixture recovery, and C3 was rolled back rather than retained as a public or configurable helper switch. The private measurement-contract/interface-floor redesign stage now records persistent_interface_floor_confirmed: D2 phase-referenced modal coherence is not ready (uniform max phase spread 31.479 deg; subgrid max phase spread 154.787 deg), D3 local E/H impedance/Poynting is not ready (eta0 relative error 0.858047; local vacuum magnitude error 0.833793), and D4 interface-ledger correlation remains positive with current helper-state interface residual evidence plus prior committed manufactured-ledger context. This confirms a persistent private interface-floor lane; public true-R/T/DFT/flux/TFSF/port/S-parameter/API/result/hook promotion remains closed. The next safe lane is private interface-floor repair theory/implementation after measurement-contract diagnostics ralplan. No solver hunk is retained; public true-R/T/DFT/flux/TFSF/port/S-parameter/API/result/hook promotion remains closed. The next safe lane is private higher-order SBP face-norm/interface-operator redesign. The private face-norm/interface-operator redesign ladder now records no_private_face_norm_operator_repair: the existing face restriction is already the unmasked mass-adjoint of prolongation under current diagonal norms, H1 mass-adjoint and H2 diagonal-norm candidates fail the manufactured ledger or higher-order projection/noop gates, and no solver hunk is retained. Public true-R/T/DFT/flux/TFSF/port/S-parameter/API/result/hook promotion remains closed. The next safe lane is private broader SBP derivative/interior-boundary operator redesign. The global derivative/mortar architecture evidence is private operator-contract evidence only: it adds rfx/subgridding/sbp_operators.py and tests A1-A4 without adding public TFSF/DFT/flux/port/S-parameter/true-R/T surfaces or a retained solver hunk. The global derivative/mortar A4 guard now records all-six-face edge/corner partition closure plus CPML/non-CPML SAT staging evidence.

candidates.formula: apply current face SAT, then solve E(after + a*d_hy) - E(before) + W_interface(before) = 0 using the minimum-norm matched Hy mode

orientation_sign_convention.comparison: coarse S_n is compared with restrict_face(fine S_n) under the coarse face norm

equations.ledger: Delta E_trace + dt * sum_c(Wc * (S_c - R S_f)) = 0
equations.candidate: a is the minimum-norm root of E(after_current + a*d_hy) - E(before) + W_interface(before) = 0

candidates.operator_formula: R* = Hc^-1 P^T Hf from existing face norms

private_face_norm_operator_repair.selection_rule: accept H1 before H2 only if norm-adjoint identity, matched-trace noop, ledger, update-bound, and edge/corner gates all pass

candidates.derivation: minimum-norm root of the private trace-energy identity Delta E_trace + W_interface = 0 in the reduced face fixture

candidates.admission_gate: requires G1 plus derivative/interior-boundary operator compatibility

candidates.reason: a reduced energy identity can be closed only as a face-local minimum-norm correction, while production retention requires a compatible derivative/mortar operator that is outside the allowed private sbp_sat_3d.py hunk

private_derivative_interface_repair.selection_rule: retain a private solver hunk only if G1-G3 pass and G4 does not require a global SBP derivative/mortar operator refactor
private_derivative_interface_repair.next_prerequisite: global SBP derivative/mortar operator architecture after private derivative/interior-boundary ladder required operator refactor ralplan
private_derivative_interface_repair.reason: the reduced derivative/interior-boundary identity reproduces the current 0.02 ledger-floor failure and can be closed only by a test-local face correction; retaining a production hunk requires global SBP derivative/mortar operator infrastructure outside this private lane

benchmark_flux_dft_gate.private_derivative_interface_repair_next: global SBP derivative/mortar operator architecture after private derivative/interior-boundary ladder required operator refactor ralplan

candidates.reason: A1-A4 operator identities are ready, but this architecture lane retains no sbp_sat_3d.py hunk; a single-owner solver-integration lane must bind the private operators next

private_global_derivative_mortar_operato.next_prerequisite: private solver integration hunk from global SBP derivative/mortar operator architecture after A1-A4 evidence summary ralplan
